## Type of change

- [ ] Add project(s)
- [ ] Remove project(s)
- [ ] New category
- [ ] Fix (broken link, description, etc.)
- [ ] Other

## Project(s) added

<!--
For each project added, indicate:
- Repository URL
- URL of the EU regulation/institution/standard it supports (e.g., eur-lex.europa.eu, eurostat.ec.europa.eu)
Remove this section if not applicable.
-->

| Project | EU regulation/institution |
|---------|--------------------------|
| https://github.com/... | https://... |

## Project(s) removed

<!--
For each project removed, indicate:
- Repository URL
- Reason (archived, broken, replaced, out of scope, etc.)
Remove this section if not applicable.
-->

| Project | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| https://github.com/... | ... |

## Checklist

- [ ] There are no **duplicates** in the list.
- [ ] Entries follow the format with badges: `- [Name](URL) [![Stars](...) ... - Description ending with a period.`
- [ ] Entries include star, last-commit, language, and license badges.
- [ ] Entries are in **alphabetical order** within their section.

> **Note:** Linting runs automatically in CI via [awesome-lint-extra](https://github.com/GeiserX/awesome-lint-extra). No need to run it manually.
